programme.title: Aerial Africa
programme.desc: Explore the Western Cape's stunning shorelines, dramatic mountains, and richly-diverse metropolis, from thousands of feet in the air.

programme.title: Wild Heroes
programme.desc: This time on Wild Heroes, Little penguin Snapper returns to the colony but will he be accepted? The vet team prepare to treat Samantran tiger Sali, and the Zoo helps to save an endangered native species at risk.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Destination China: Yunnan
programme.desc: Destination China will take the audience to some of Yunnan's most beautiful and stunning landscapes and homes to around 6000 species of plants, 200 mammals and 500 species of birds.

programme.title: Naledi: A Baby Elephant's Tale
programme.desc: Naledi follows the journey of a baby elephant orphaned in a rescue camp, as the man tasked with her survival races to protect an entire species while fighting to save her life.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Cape Gannets are tough hunters flying over the coasts for their favorite prey: shoals of sardines, waiting for a surprising ally: dolphins.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Under the burning sun of Cape Cross, large colonies of seals gather on Namibia's Skeleton Coast...The males, who can weigh up to 360 kg, patrol the territory to protect their females and young. But new predators are coming from the land, forcing them to learn new defense behaviors.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the heart of the Valdees Peninsula, in Patagonia, whales are regularly hunted by a predator whose diminutive size hides its gruesome intentions: the seagull, forcing whales to dive deep into the depths, away from essential oxygen and light.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Every spring in Norway, whales use a clever hunting technique called “bubble feeding” to catch quantities of herring. When they spot a shoal of herring, they begin to encircle the herring, periodically releasing streams of bubbles that form a curtain of air, surrounding the fish.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: Marine biologists Eve Jourdain and Richard Kaoliussen have spent two years studying the orcas in Norway, where they have adapted the carrousel technique to their habitat.

programme.title: Sea Hunters
programme.desc: In the depths of the ocean, swift and agile sea lions perform incredible underwater maneuvers to outwit their enemies. Here, on the beaches of Patagonia, as a sea lion pup learns to swim, predators are preparing an attack on him, one that will be fatal.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: What does it take to maintain alpha status as animals grow older? We investigate the responsibilities and challenges that come with being a senior leader of a pack.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: We explore the integral role that older animals play in their communities and investigate how animals learn over the course of their lives.

programme.title: Aging in the Wild
programme.desc: Human, plant, animal, bacteria, all have one inevitable thing in common; death. In this episode we discover the ways in which aging animals defy our usual understanding of the circle of life.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s cheese quest continues in Greece, the motherland of Feta, and where cheese culture dates back thousands of years in ancient practices.

programme.title: Cheese, a Love Story
programme.desc: Afrim’s final stop is beautiful British Columbia, Canada’s West coast, where an innovative cheese culture is driven by its ‘support local’ mentality.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam Liaw arrives in his mum's home town of Beijing to begin a culinary, historical and personal journey through the ancient country of China.

programme.title: Destination Flavour: China
programme.desc: Adam visits the beautiful, mountainous province of Anhui, home to one of the eight great regional cuisines of China. Anhui cuisine is hearty, peasant food that uses seasonal, wild produce from the mountains.

programme.title: Neymar: Brazil's Number One
programme.desc: From the streets of Santos to becoming Brazil's number one goal scorer, the 20-year journey of Neymar is one for the history books. Having played football on nearly every continent, Neymar will go down as a legend of the game, forever.

programme.title: Brad Pitt: Breaking Hollywood
programme.desc: He may be one of the sexiest Hollywood actors, but his career and personal goals offer much more than his looks. Brad Pitt. One of the leading names in all of Hollywood. The well-known story of an unknown talent who transformed into a superstar.

programme.title: Tom Hanks: The Nomad
programme.desc: From humble beginnings to an aspiring thespian to acting as some of the world’s most iconic and notable characters. He has picked up a reputation as ‘America’s Nice Guy’, ’The Everyman’ and a nomad of the arts. But we all know him… as Tom Hanks.

programme.title: Carrie Underwood: Southern Grace
programme.desc: From a small-town farm in Checotah, Oklahoma, to the biggest stages in the world — Carrie Underwood’s journey is the story of a dream, a voice, and a fire that couldn’t be ignored. This is the story of Carrie Underwood — the all-American girl who became a living legend.

programme.title: Sting: Ever Evolving
programme.desc: Sting: Ever Evolving is an enthralling documentary that delves into the multifaceted life of one of music's most iconic figures. The documentary offers an unprecedented glimpse into the mind of a musical legend, showcasing how his art continues to inspire and challenge the world.

programme.title: Kate Winslet: Leading Lady
programme.desc: Oscar-winner Kate Winslet, known for Titanic, is celebrated for her versatile, intense performances in both Hollywood blockbusters and indie films, cementing her as one of the finest actors of her generation.

programme.title: Gerrard: Born to Lead
programme.desc: In an illustrious professional career that spans over 20 years, Gerrard has experienced and succeeded at the pinnacle of the sport, lifting trophies as a player and manager, and representing his country. But with the highs, came the lows.

programme.title: Cristiano Ronaldo: The One and Only
programme.desc: Witness the journey from the young Portuguese prodigy to one of the greatest players of all time. This is the one and only...Cristiano Ronaldo.

programme.title: Armstrong
programme.desc: Dramatic, moving and insightful, Armstrong tells the definitive life story of Neil Armstrong - from his childhood in rural Ohio, through aerial combat in Korea, to his first steps on the Moon - and the unwanted celebrity status that ensued.

programme.title: Tom Hanks: The Nomad
programme.desc: From humble beginnings to an aspiring thespian to acting as some of the world’s most iconic and notable characters. He has picked up a reputation as ‘America’s Nice Guy’, ’The Everyman’ and a nomad of the arts. But we all know him… as Tom Hanks.

programme.title: Harrison Ford: Hollywood Hero
programme.desc: Everyone thinks they know Harrison Ford. They know the adventurous Nazi-fighting archaeologist and the Blade Runner from a dystopian future. But nobody really knows the man behind the movies once the cameras have stopped rolling.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi sends Tony and Layla to steal weapons codes from a Russian oligarch, while Margaret “Echo” Pearl, Cisco and Frostee use Shashi’s absence to sneak into Shashi’s Cliffside mansion to investigate. Ms. Nowhere tells the team to look for the “keys” in Shashi’s mansion, but all they find are a couple of awesome super-cars.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Shashi stages a race up the privately-owned Mount Zebulon, and he invites Tony, Cisco, and Margaret “Echo” Pearl to participate. The crew soon discovers that Shashi is using the race to steal another super-car (this time from space!) – and he knows that Tony is working with the feds.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Ms. Nowhere tells the kids that the failed mission is over, but Tony isn’t ready to give up, and he’s determined to rescue Frostee. The crew goes rogue by deciding to steal the final key from Shashi and trade it for their friend.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: 17-year-old Tony Toretto and his gang are psyched when Dom recommends them to Ms. Nowhere for a spy racing job. Excited to get the opportunity to live up to Dom’s legacy, they use their street smarts and driving skills to infiltrate a race with SH1FT3R, a high-octane racing circuit whose drivers are all under 20.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: Tony goes head-to-head with SH1FT3R’s main recruiter Layla Gray in a death-defying spy race through LA Tunnels, parking lots and construction sites. Tony’s awesome driving impresses Shashi Dhar (the head of SH1FT3R and the person Ms. Nowhere wants them to investigate), and after Tony and his crew pull a heist on a big rig full of energy drinks for Shashi, they’re officially accepted into the circuit.

programme.title: Voltron: Legendary Defender
programme.desc: Keith and Krolia discover troubling details about Lotor

programme.title: Team Zenko Go
programme.desc: Ari moves in to Harmony Harbor, but notices something strange involving a group of kids, a Noodle Truck chef and her pet squirrel. / After Ari discovers the secret of Team Zenko Go, he asks to join the crew. But first he must learn the importance of teamwork.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Bob goes to great lengths to keep Larry from sleepwalking/The mayor's monacle is missing, and Madame Blueberry is on the case.

programme.title: Veggietales: In the House
programme.desc: Larry feels pressured to perform crazy awesome tasks with his new bulldozer from his friends/Against Bob's advice, Larry brings home a pear-a-keet to be his new pet bird.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: When one of Rikki’s plants won't sing, Pixie and Juniper both tell their varying recollections of why the plant is suddenly silent. / Kelp, Scallop, and Cruz have always thought that starfish did nothing but laze about; but as they go about their day, the starfish goes through his own routine, completely unbeknownst to everyone else.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Leroy must learn to let go when his caterpillar friend turns into a butterfly. / When Pixie loses her spark, Kelp and Juniper look for the plant they think will cure her. Meanwhile Pixie wonders whether she can be cured at all!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Baby Box is learning to be a great magician and wants to pull a rabbit out of a hat. But when there's no rabbit to be found, Gabby, Pandy and Baby Box visit the other Gabby Cats for help. For the COTD, Baby Box, Gabby and Pandy sing the "Whoopsies!" Song.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: It’s Easter-time in the dollhouse! When Gabby unboxes an Easter basket with an orange egg inside, all the Gabby Cats want to know what’s inside, but when CatRat accidentally sends it rolling out of Kitty Fairy’s garden, Gabby and Pandy go on a springtime search through the Dollhouse to find it. Then, when the egg hatches, they meet Eggy, the Easter Kitty Bunny! For our Cat of the Day segment, Baby Box gets crafty.

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders
programme.desc: Aggro is embarrassed about big changes she's going through. And when she gets stuck in a volcano, the Rescue Riders seek help from ... Magnus?

programme.title: Dragons: Rescue Riders

programme.title: Dew Drops Diaries
programme.desc: While helping Lola pack for her first day of camp, the Dews get stuck inside her backpack! Using the random items inside, the Dews get crafty in their attempt to break out. / When Eden and Phoebe join Harper and Marcus for a playdate, the Dews disagree on what activity their kids should do, ultimately learning that there are lots of ways to play!

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: It’s Pawston’s annual Take Your Kid to Work Day, and it’s Tag’s year to spend the day at the Doorbell Store with Paw. \ Sam Whippet challenges the Not Yet Cadets to complete an obstacle course in the woods.

programme.title: Go, Dog. Go!
programme.desc: Scooch is bummed out because he’s missing his favorite holiday back in his old farm town, so Tag wants to cheer him up by rounding up some chickens and bringing Clucky Day to Pawston. \ When there’s a schedule mix-up and the Pawston Get Sox players think they have a day off, it’s up to Tag and Scooch to round up all five players in time for the fetch game, so that they don’t have to forfeit.

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Huzzah! Gabby the Bold and Pandy the Purr-owd are Knights in Training, and they head into the dollhouse for the Royal Knighting Ceremony. But it turns out that someone's locked King Catnip in the tower and without him they'll have to cancel the Royal Knighting Ceremony! It's up to the Knights in Training to solve the mystery and save King Catnip by performing acts of knighthood. For our Cat of the Day, Pandy makes a shield craft!

programme.title: Gabby's Dollhouse
programme.desc: Gabby receives a special nighttime delivery, unboxing a glow-in-the-dark train engine. However, she realizes that she's missing the other three train cars to complete the whole train. programme.desc: The kids scare away a swarm of bees. But when they realize bees make the flowers happy, they hatch a plan to get them back! / When Scallop makes a bad choice, Kelp helps her learn from her mistakes.

programme.title: Not Quite Narwhal
programme.desc: Kelp and the rest of his friends put on a game of rainbow ball, but Kelp begins to wonder how well his special spark can help him truly measure up to his favorite player. / When the underwater friends meet someone new, they’re reminded that their differences make them unique.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers
programme.desc: It’s revealed that Cleve is building a massive weather machine that is generating dangerous desert storms, with the help of a genius North African teen named Ziri. When Cleve creates a sandstorm to take out the crew, they’re saved by two Bedouin brothers named Kareem and Salem (and their pack of camels). Echo questions her ability to be a good leader and if they should give up. But after the storm clears, Tony challenges the brothers to a camel race in order to get their help tracking down Cleve – and he wins! Now the Bedouins have to take the kids to the Eye of the Sahara, a huge strange storm that they know has something to do with Cleve’s plot. Elsewhere in the Sahara, Ms. Nowhere and Gary are captured by Cleve.

programme.title: Fast & Furious: Spy Racers

programme.desc: Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales, which have already survived so much.

programme.title: Trailblazers: A Rocky Mountain Road Trip 1
programme.desc: Ruby Wax, Mel B and Emily Atack travel off-road through Utah and trek the mountains of Aspen as they investigate the meaning of the American Dream.

programme.title: Sue Perkins' Big Adventure: Paris to Istanbul 1
programme.desc: In Salzburg, Sue becomes a yodelling YouTuber and does yoga with alpacas. In Vienna, she waltzes, goes hot rod racing and has the fattiest dumplings in the world.

programme.title: Food Factory 5
programme.desc: A single sturgeon can produce a bowl of sustainable caviar worth $12,000; a shepherd's pie puts a modern twist on Mom's classic recipe; a family business rolls out nine million risotto balls every year; and discover the secret to making decadent ice wine truffles.

programme.title: Food Factory 5
programme.desc: See how the cheese met the peanut butter in this legendary sandwich snack; get the scoop on two-toned frozen fruit bars from Florida; 1.5 million blueberry dumplings are produced in just one shift; and it takes a mountain of super-food to make tantalizing kale chips.

programme.title: Whale with Steve Backshall 1
programme.desc: Steve returns home to the Atlantic waters of the British Isles as he considers the question of what humanity can do to ensure the enduring future of whales, which have already survived so much.

programme.title: Ancient Powers 1

programme.title: Food Factory 5
programme.desc: Melt-in-your-mouth chocolate mints are lovingly finished by hand. In a unique antipasto, the star ingredient goes from field to jar all on the same day; Aussie-style soft licorice owes its success to a blunder Down Under; and find out the secret to making perfectly seasoned plantain chips.

programme.title: Food Factory 5
programme.desc: Peanut butter cups feature an amazing history and a one-of-a-kind butterscotch coating; starting with giant slabs of butter, three million Sara Lee pound cakes are produced every year; three types of citrus go from tree to jar at this Florida orchard; and a butter chicken cooking sauce is made at a university research facility.

programme.title: Immortal Songs
programme.desc: The true classic of the century is born again! The legendary classic is reinterpreted by the best vocalists in Korea. Don't miss out on the heart-moving moments that transcend generations.

programme.title: Our Happy Days
programme.desc: A chaotic, high-stakes family saga where a seemingly perfect man and an endearingly flawed woman collide while every generation fights to become the main character of their own life.

programme.title: Pearl in Red
programme.desc: A meticulous and intense revenge chronicle in which two women return under false identities to uncover the truths and sins hidden within the Adel family.

programme.title: Dear.M
programme.desc: A pure, no-filter youth romance drama unraveling a pink-hued mystery as they search for ‘M', the protagonist behind the love letter that turned Seoyeon University upside down.

programme.title: Krazy Rich Korean
programme.desc: Just how crazy do you have to be to conquer the world? Step inside the lives of the pioneers behind the Korean Wave, and discover what it really takes to achieve world-class success.

programme.title: A Graceful Liar
programme.desc: A bold yet heartbreaking story of a mother and daughter-in-law who meet through marriage and wage a war of lies to seize the Geonhyang family, struggling for a dramatic reversal of fortune.

programme.title: Recipe for Love
programme.desc: In Onjeong Market, located in Onjeong, a town some distance away from Seoul, the area is buzzing with change as apartment complexes are built and plans for subway extensions and new town developments are announced. Across a single street stand a principled general hospital, Gongmyeongjeongdae Clinic, and traditional Korean clinic, Yangji Barun Clinic. The two families who run these places have been bitter enemies for years, bound by a long standing grudge from an incident in the past. Even the smallest matters turn into big fights, making them the most famous rival families in Onjeong. This is a family growth drama about these two families as they unravel their long held misunderstandings, heal their wounds, learn to love one another, and are reborn as one family.

programme.title: Noona, You Are A Woman To Me
programme.desc: Age is just a number—attraction is pure instinct. Charismatic “Noonas” (older women) who have long put love on hold to pursue their careers meet younger men who fearlessly follow their hearts, sparking emotionally driven romances. Breaking through the real-world barriers of age differences, this bold and candid reality series follows older-woman–younger-man couples as they explore love with honesty and courage. As their relationships unfold, long-dormant romantic instincts are awakened in this refreshingly daring dating reality show.

programme.title: Problem Child in House

programme.title: 10 Fight 10 Season 3
programme.desc: The show brings Thai superstars, singers, boxers, models and rappers into the celebrity boxing ring. Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. This unique boxing show offers all-round entertainment, with live performances, lavish costumes and real fights with blood!

programme.title: The Comeback
programme.desc: Uncle Hua is a retired agent who owns an antique shop on an old street. When the old street is forcibly demolished by the local Green Dragon Gang one day, Uncle Hua’s hidden identity is accidentally revealed, and he is pursued by a mysterious organization headed by Ah Jie. A fatal duel has just begun!

programme.title: Extreme Ends
programme.desc: Extreme Ends is an action-adventure reality show featuring four celebrities and their special guests experiencing the diversity of Hong Kong! Embark on the journey with two Thai artistes, Gun and Ticha, as they navigate the bustling city life and discover the serene outskirts of Hong Kong.

programme.title: Iron Ball
programme.desc: This sports entertainment show brings the best special forces from Iron Squad to take on a new challenge – dodgeball. The 26 players will enter a fierce competition, until a strongest team armed with powerful athletic endurance and mental strength is formed. Witness how they compete in front of the star athletes and legendary dodgeball coaches!

programme.title: Iron Squad W
programme.desc: The fourth season of this Korean military survival show will determine the most elite female soldier. It brings together six Special Force units to compete in challenging missions across land, sea, and air. Top female reservists form teams of four to compete against one another. Witness how they battle to the end in front of six celebrity hosts!

programme.title: Wu Lin: The Society
programme.desc: Set in 2050, where rampant pollution and viruses force people to wear masks just to breathe, yet daily life continues as usual. When a series of mysterious deaths erupts, police suspect a serial killer while rumors swirl of a demon on a rampage. Now, the police must race to unravel the mystery and stop the killings before panic consumes the city.

programme.title: Agent of Death
programme.desc: After undergoing a secret government experiment, CIA operative Tara gains the ability to shapeshift into anyone through DNA transformation, making her the ultimate infiltrator. When her father is murdered and evidence points to her own agency, she is forced to go rogue. Now, she must stop stolen uranium from triggering a global nuclear catastrophe.

Season 2 features a first ever Thai female match and Season 3 has two Olympics gold medalists competing for the championship. programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah puts a twist on the classic Polish dish galumpkis by using smoked ham hocks. The ham hocks and cabbage are cooked in a seasoned stock, while the stuffing is made from pork, rice and more.

programme.title: Hoax: The Kidnapping of Sherri Papini
programme.desc: In 2016, Sherri Papini's disappearance captivated the nation, but her abduction story unraveled when it was revealed she was not a kidnap victim as she initially claimed.

programme.title: Silent Night, Fatal Night
programme.desc: Famous mystery writer Victoria Rollins is presumed dead until her social-media page announces her new novel. But when a fan tries to confirm the author's existence, she's flung into a deadly web of lies.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Julie and Julian spend most weekends escaping the hustle of city life by sailing, swimming and enjoying the coastal lifestyle. Now they have decided to turn their ocean escapes into their main job.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Author and chef Sara Moulton joins Rachael in her Tuscan kitchen to create a meal using ingredients from Rachael's pantry. Sara prepares a free-form crostata using a variety of vegetables.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S2)
programme.desc: Rachael shows how to cook hot honey chicken, a simple and enjoyable dish made with seasoned chicken thighs, which she serves with charred corn on the cob.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: MasterChef Australia is in Hong Kong! After exploring the culinary capital, the first challenge is a Hong Kong style Mystery Box, set on Victoria Harbour.

programme.title: Dr. Pimple Popper: Breaking Out (S1)
programme.desc: Tierra is a musician with massive bumps on her ears that hold her back from performing. Dr. Zoe assists Dr. Lee in helping Ryan, whose numerous head bumps undermine his life journey.

programme.title: Rachael Ray's Meals in Minutes (S3)
programme.desc: To celebrate her wedding anniversary, Rachael prepares her famous beet risotto, made with roasted beetroot, red wine, onions, ricotta salata and more.

programme.title: You Better Watch Out
programme.desc: It's Christmas Eve and Aubrey is rushing to Chicago for the birth of her sister's baby. Her plane is grounded in a snowstorm, leaving her stranded for the night at a small-town airport.

programme.title: How She Caught A Killer
programme.desc: The Route 40 Killer targets sex workers with an unknown motive. Detective Linda Murphy goes undercover and gets entangled in a chilling cat-and-mouse game, reminiscent of The Silence of the Lambs.

programme.title: Earth Sweepers
programme.desc: On their final night in Mongolia, the Earth-Cleaning Bros reflect under a sky full of stars — no signal, no power, just nature. But peace turns to panic as temperatures drop to - 10°C.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: Back on the road, Theresa spends a few days in Chicago. Before braving a ride at the top of one of the city's tallest buildings, Theresa brings comfort to a woman who lost her mom after a brief illness.

programme.title: The Mother Flip (S1)
programme.desc: Rebecca and Kristy take on a recently raided, abandoned house, now up for sale at a very low price. A real hot mess, this eyesore is currently a raccoon den with a sagging roof and holes in the walls.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia (S16)
programme.desc: After a demonstration from Michelin starred chef Vicky Cheng, three cooks must recreate his ‘Three Ages of Daikon Radish’ vegetarian dish, from memory alone, the winner claiming immunity.

programme.title: Global Soul Kitchen (S2)
programme.desc: Chef Deborah brings a Filipino classic to life with her adobo baby back ribs and pancit noodles, each with a Southern twist and inspired by a chef in Atlanta. She marinates the ribs and pan-fries them.

programme.title: Oceanfront Property Hunt (S1)
programme.desc: Despite being from different parts of the world, Raquel and Samir first bonded over their shared love of the ocean. Now married, they are racing to find the perfect coastal home.

programme.title: Rachael Ray in Tuscany
programme.desc: Rachael prepares her favourite Sicilian dish, pasta con le sarde, or sardine pasta, using both canned fish and fresh sardines atop long-cut pasta.

programme.title: Ppang Car Road 2
programme.desc: From Seoul to Busan, this spectacular eating show takes place at famous bakeries/patisseries to give the dessert lovers the glimpse of tasty goodness of some of the most-coveted desserts of all.

programme.title: Jake Makes It Easy (S1)
programme.desc: Jake makes two of his favourite super-simple crowd-pleasers. First, Iraqi roast salmon slathered in a caramelised onion and tomato sauce. This main dish is paired with a decadent fudgy date brownie.

programme.title: Theresa Caputo: Raising Spirits (S1)
programme.desc: A busy Theresa is desperate to plan a girls' night with her besties. While at lunch, Spirit pulls Theresa into a reading that finds a departed mom asking her daughter's boyfriend for a proposal!

programme.title: Mama's Little Murderer
programme.desc: Devoted single mother Constance struggles to balance her newfound love with Leo and the obsessive, destructive behaviour of her son, Anthony, who will go to extreme lengths to keep her to himself.

programme.desc: Home cook and drag artist Caleb can't believe his big audition with Eddie Jackson is actually a competition!

programme.desc: Ayesha and her friends have a day off from the kids,so they're making a decadent girls' brunch together.They enjoy a light Bloody Mary topped with Brown Sugar Bacon.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: Operation Barbarossa, Nazi Germany’s surprise invasion of the Soviet Union, launches on June 22, 1941. In what is the largest military operation in history, Hitler aims to capture their economic resources.

programme.title: The Bermuda Triangle: Into Cursed Waters (S2)
programme.desc: Did a Bermuda Triangle tsunami claim two behemoth ships, or did they fall prey to Nazi U-Boats? The team sets its sights on a famous Bermuda Triangle case: the twin vanishings of two massive cargo ships.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: Hazardous History with Henry Winkler (S1)
programme.desc: Welcome to the unreal truth about everyday products of the past that were way more dangerous than meets the unsuspecting eye. Sensational items like mail-order dynamite and radioactive dishes.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: After defeating Poland, Hitler looks west, planning an attack into France that will take advantage of a weak point in their defences. British Prime Minister Churchill scrambles to evacuate Allied troops.

programme.title: Swamp People (S14)
programme.desc: The Landry's target the legendary beasts of Cow Island. Daniel sets an ambitious goal to catch 10 alligators over 10 feet long. Ashley gambles on a new hunting ground.

programme.title: History's Greatest Escapes with Morgan Freeman (S2)
programme.desc: Rene Belbenoit, a petty thief, is captured and sent to France's notorious penal colony in French Guiana. He determines to escape or die trying. His story becomes the basis of several popular movies.

programme.title: World War II with Tom Hanks
programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.desc: In September 1939, enabled by a secret pact between Adolf Hitler and Josef Stalin, Germany invades Poland with its lightning style of tank warfare, plunging Europe back into war.

programme.title: Hidden Cities (S1)
programme.desc: Uncover the dark secrets of an island off Penang, a mysterious colonial castle and a prehistoric human settlement in Perak.

programme.title: The Death Coast
programme.desc: Following the trail of a cache of precious gemstones, Jeff and the team move further beyond the breakers, in search of The Neptune. With stormy weather closing in, a new find may lead them one step closer.

programme.title: Swamp People (S15)
programme.desc: Ronnie and Timmy chase a legendary gator that's been on the run for years. Willie Edwards and his son Little Willie head to an isolated body of water to chase a behemoth that's causing trouble.

programme.title: The UnBelievable with Dan Aykroyd (S1)
programme.desc: In Boston, a 25-foot tidal wave of...molasses? A dancing plague that kills 100 people? A surgery with a 300% mortality rate? We search the globe for the strangest and most bizarre deaths on record.

programme.title: The Curse of Oak Island (S12)
programme.desc: After months of tireless work and focused research, the massive excavation to recover the fabled Chappell Vault begins.

programme.title: Secrets Declassified with David Duchovny (S1)
programme.desc: The underbelly of science has never lurked as prominently as when it was harnessed for state-sanctioned 'research'. In newly published records, discover Stalin's trials to create a hybrid human-ape army.

programme.title: Mountain Men (S13)
programme.desc: Marty desperately searches for a bull moose that vanished in thick brush; Mike hustles to pack out the meat from a bull elk before it can be scavenged by brown bears.

programme.title: Wolf Pack
programme.desc: The Wolf Pack squad led by Lao Diao, is a foreign-based team that specializes in overseas security jobs. In one of the missions, the squad discovers that a terrorist force is planning to destroy the country’s energy source. Lao Diao is now entrusted with the task of leading his squad to fight back. Can the Wolf Pack save the day?

programme.title: Man on the Edge
programme.desc: On the eve of the 1997 handover, violence is rampant with triad forces causing chaos in Hong Kong. The triad gang leader assigns his right-hand man Ah Lok to take charge of the drug trafficking business. However, Ah Lok turns out to be an undercover police officer who unveils a shocking political conspiracy during the investigation.

programme.title: The Shadow Boxing
programme.desc: Chan and his apprentice Fan transport zombies for a living and are hired to move nine zombies in one go. When two hop away, it is revealed that one is actually a man in disguise trying to escape his enemies. It turns out that both the disguised zombie and Chan are martial arts experts!

programme.title: The Lady Assassin
programme.desc: Two feuding princes fight for the throne in the Qing Dynasty, causing many injuries and deaths to the commoners. Can the lady assassin who is drawn into this royal feud execute her assassination mission in time to help one of the princes secure the throne?

programme.title: Tales of a Eunuch
programme.desc: Wei Xiao Bao enters the palace and unexpectedly befriends Emperor Kang Xi. At the same time, he is assigned by a revolutionary group to steal the valuable "Sutra of 42 Chapters," which Emperor Kang Xi himself is also seeking. Demonstrating keen intelligence, Xiao Bao deftly navigates between opposing factions and successfully evades danger.

programme.title: Marco Polo
programme.desc: Mongolian emperor Kublai Khan is being assassinated while meeting with the Italian explorer Marco Polo. Marco Polo is appointed to lead the troops for the emperor to wipe out the anti-Mongol rebels. Yet, he is touched by these rebels who are resisting the Mongolian invasion of their homeland. Will Marco Polo stay loyal to the emperor?

programme.title: The Narrow Road
programme.desc: Chak, a small cleaning company owner, hits tough times during the pandemic. In need of an assistant, he hires a young single mother Candy, who unexpectedly helps him solve many difficulties at work. While life seems to get back on track, a series of cruel realities happen again, but they still bond together to support each other on the narrow road.

programme.title: Burning Blood
programme.desc: Narcotics squad members—Tai Hua, Lao Mi, Ah Feng, and Ah Tang—are involved in arresting a drug lord. However, a betrayal within the police leads to the deaths of Ah Feng and his superior, while Ah Tang vanishes. As Tai Hua and Lao Mi uncover the truth, they find themselves torn between loyalty and betrayal in their fight against the drug cartel.

programme.title: Return of the One-armed Swordsman
programme.desc: One-armed Swordsman Fang Kang wants to lead a quiet life with his wife, but when she is abducted by the Eight Demon Swordsmen clan, he is forced to take them on in order to save her.

programme.title: The Magnificent Trio
programme.desc: A group of farmers who are being oppressed by the local magistrates kidnap one of the magistrate’s daughter in the hope of being heard by the authorities. A wandering swordsman offers his help and aiding him are two fighters who have both switched sides from being the oppressors to the oppressed. The trio fight back against the magistrates!

programme.title: Monkey Kung Fu
programme.desc: Wei Chun is a cocky young man sentenced to jail for killing a man in a fight. One day, Wei Chun picks a fight with a seemingly defenseless old man who completely thrashes him! The old man turns out to be the master of monkey style kung fu and as they become friends, he gives Wei Chun half of a medallion that would direct him to hidden secrets.

programme.title: 3AM - The Office
programme.desc: The Hungry Ghost Festival is around the corner. A newcomer at a workplace offends the ghosts in his office building when he shows disrespect for the spirits on his first day at work. In the course of a night shift, the man and his colleagues working overtime experience spooky encounters that make them reflect on their behaviours and beliefs...

programme.title: Detective Dee's the Zombie Town
programme.desc: Detective Dee investigates a series of terrifying vampire transformations in Youming Town, uncovering a sinister conspiracy masterminded by Prince Li Zhen, who plots to overthrow the empire. Armed with courage and ingenuity, Dee defeats the bloodthirsty vampires and ultimately exposes the prince’s dark ambitions.

programme.title: Dragon Swamp
programme.desc: Fan is cheated by her lover Tong to steal her master’s Jade Dragon Sword. She is jailed in the Dragon Swamp as punishment and gave birth to a pair of twins - her daughter is raised by her master, while her son is taken by Tong. Twenty years later, the sword is stolen again and Fan’s daughter goes seeking for it, meeting Fan’s friend along the way.

programme.title: Young Vagabond
programme.desc: Su Can, the carefree yet unruly eldest son of a winery owner, is forced to study under a tutor after being expelled from school. He soon discovers that his tutor is a martial arts master and becomes his disciple. However, when his family and master are slain by the ruthless bandit, Centipede, Su Can embarks on a perilous quest for revenge.

programme.title: My School Mate, the Barbarian
programme.desc: Edward attends a new school which has a reputation for fighting. Student leader Stone, befriends Edward, but their friendship is tested when a local triad leader discovers that Edward comes from a wealthy family.

programme.title: Mortal kong Kaaway, Kaibigang Tunay
programme.desc: Lt. Eddie Ramirez (Roi Vinzon), is a dedicated cop. Raymond Martinez (Edu Manzano), an equally dedicated hoodlum. Two strong personalities both committed to their cause.

programme.title: Isla 2
programme.desc: Celso Ad Castillo once again directs with newcomer Via Veloso in the title role of Isla, the young girl who will do anything just to be able to escape her lustful adoptive father and the desolate island where she might spend her entire life.

programme.title: Pati ba Pintig ng Puso? (Digitally Enhanced)
programme.desc: Eddie Garcia was at his best as the autocratic patriarch who ruled his family and all the people around him with an iron hand. But his grandson would have none of this.

programme.title: Ngayon at Kailanman
programme.desc: Ayra (Sharon Cuneta), an heiress who came home to bury her dead father and who later discovered that her family's estate had been taken over by Edwin (Richard Gomez), her childhood sweetheart and the son of their former overseer.

programme.title: Zacarias
programme.desc: The movie depicted a different kind of action picture which included hard action scenes with touches of comedy. The action hero was waging a tough war against corruption, oppression and syndicated crime.

programme.title: Hulihin Si nardong Toothpick
programme.desc: Nardo was a simple student cum bank janitor who was accidentally accused of murder and robbery. The truth was, while he really intended to rob the victim, he had a change of heart.

programme.title: Rocky N Rolly (Suntok Sabay Takbo)
programme.desc: The swindling trio of Rolly, Alex and Cleto earn big bucks by using different disguises to fool people. They soon join forces with ex-boxer, Rocky, who quit the sport after syndicate hench men beat him up for refusing him to join the game.

programme.title: Bagwis ng Lawin
programme.desc: Bagwis Ng Lawin

programme.title: Pandoy... Alalay ng Panday
programme.desc: In Pandoy, Joey De Leon gave a comic twist to the popular "Panday," a fictional action hero popularized by the King himself, Fernando Poe, Jr.

programme.title: Pretty Boy
programme.desc: Andrew E times two doubles the fun in this comedy about mistaken identities and the hilarious results. Andrew played Pretty Boy, a well-known gangster who was dressed in designer suits.

programme.title: Sabado Nights
programme.desc: This is a tale of love and friendship among three young women, whose lives centered on what they do every Saturday night.

programme.title: The Maggie Dela Riva Story
programme.desc: Maggie Dela Riva was a popular young actress in 1969 when she was abducted and raped by four men from rich, influential families. Concerned about the rising number of crimes against women, Maggie came out of retirement to once more tell her story.

programme.title: Andrea, Paano ba ang Maging Isang Ina?
programme.desc: The true story of a law enforcer who did everything he could to uphold the law.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo
programme.desc: NEWSROOM TOKYO dives deeper into the day's news with insight and analysis, from the perspective of Japan and the rest of Asia. We put a spotlight on what you need to know to understand the issues.

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Sugiura Mitsuyoshi is gaining attention both at home and abroad for transforming old kimonos into new fashion statements. He talks about his unique efforts to revitalize a traditional industry.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #2 Summer
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: The Piercing Gaze
programme.desc: A man strikes a pose in an iconic woodblock print by the artist Sharaku. Who is the mysterious figure... and what is he doing? And why did the artist want to commemorate the moment?

programme.title: Today's Close-Up
programme.desc: As Japan's population ages, pets are often left without care, a burden that passes on to medical and care workers. Partnerships between healthcare and animal welfare professionals are emerging.

programme.title: Document 72 Hours
programme.desc: Half of the residents of a university dorm in Oita Prefecture are from outside Japan. Students cook food, bathe communally and stay up chatting. We learn about their friendships and frustrations.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Science View
programme.desc: Discover how eels navigate 3,000 km in the vast ocean without getting lost. Also find out about a new technology that can share physical sensations.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Journeys in Japan
programme.desc: Explore a different side of Japan. Meet the locals and discover traditions and cultures not usually found in guidebooks!

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Dining With the Chef
programme.desc: Bring home the taste of Japan with Chef Rika's Gyudon Beef Bowl, a comforting classic. Tender beef and sweet onion is simmered in an umami-rich sauce, and served over steaming rice.

programme.title: NHK Newsline
programme.desc: NHK NEWSLINE brings you up to date with the latest from Japan, Asia and around the world. Our team covers breaking news and major developments, with trusted anchors to tie it all together.

programme.title: Activate your Japanese!

programme.title: Dig More Japan
programme.desc: Plants, soil, and metal. Japan's artisans turn these natural materials into masterpieces. Let's dig, a little deeper!

programme.desc: Featured recipe: Spoon-molded Sushi. Learn about easy, delicious, and healthy cooking with Chef Rika in five minutes!!

programme.title: Bosai:Safe Journey in Japan
programme.desc: The number of visitors to Japan is rising. However, many do not know what to do during an earthquake, tsunami or typhoon. Find out the technologies being developed to protect visitors from disasters.

programme.title: Impacts: Climates Change the World
programme.desc: Global warming has raised sea temperatures, increasing powerful typhoons worldwide. The program reports on their impacts and explores with experts the mechanisms and causes of their intensification.

programme.title: Time-Lapse Japan
programme.desc: A feudal lord admired by John F. Kennedy, Uesugi Yozan saved the Yonezawa Domain from financial ruin 250 years ago. Stunning time-lapse images show the historic sites that preserve his legacy.

programme.title: Newsroom Tokyo

programme.title: Direct Talk
programme.desc: Songwriter Yamamoto Sho is the man behind "Watashino Ichiban Kawaiitokoro," the global hit by the J-pop idol group FRUITS ZIPPER. He talks about creating songs that take the world by storm.

programme.title: Herbal Symphony #1 Spring
programme.desc: In Uda, discover Japan's oldest private medicinal herb garden, where the natural landscape from 300 years ago is preserved in a botanical time capsule, a sanctuary of the local culture and history.

programme.title: Ukiyoe Edo-Life: The Piercing Gaze
programme.desc: A man strikes a pose in an iconic woodblock print by the artist Sharaku. Who is the mysterious figure... and what is he doing? And why did the artist want to commemorate the moment?

programme.desc: Skye and Rocky go on their first camping trip, but when Chickaletta gets caught in a crevice, they have to call in the PAW Patrol. // Tons of baby turtles start to pop up all over town and it’s up to Ryder and the Pups to get them back to their pond.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: After the Crew builds a special lemonade stand for Lucas and Lily, a sour Speed Meister sends it rolling through Builder Cove! // Why does Crunchy the beaver cross the road? Because Rubble & Crew build a bridge to help him get to the other side!

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: There's a mystery afoot in Builder Cove! When the sculpture of all the townsfolk suddenly disappears, Chase joins Rubble & Crew to solve the case of the missing statue...and build a brand new Science Center to help investigate.

programme.title: Dora

programme.title: Dora
programme.desc: Dora and Boots find Dora's lost birthday cake and the family throws her a surprise birthday party! // Dora and Boots help La Luna find the Luna Lily so everyone can enjoy the Moonlight Fiesta.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: During a walk, the Barbapapa family discovers a megalith. // Barbabright has a stroke of genius: the invention of the "BAM".

programme.desc: Barbabelle proudly announces to her family that she wants to become a princess. // Barbabravo is moping with boredom, his brothers and sisters are all busy and no one wants to play with him.

programme.desc: Charger has a problem... he's got too much energy to sleep! Lucky for him, Rubble & Crew knows there's always a construction solution. // Rubble and the pups build Mix, Motor, Lucas, and Lily the coolest Super Squirrely Whirly playdate ever!

programme.desc: Tim & Kai compete to get Terri's spare Space-Land ticket.

programme.desc: Barbabeau, Barbabelle, and Barbabright have built a treehouse. // Barbamama is determined to stop a foul pollution.

programme.desc: Daisy and Mr. Crocodile find a tiny lizard who wants to be just like Mr. Crocodile. // Winston tries to be the leader on a nature hike, but his high-tech gadget gets everyone lost in the woods.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: With their splash park plans in troubled waters, the pups have to get creative to cool down the town for the summer. // As the pups work on building a surprise playroom for Lucas and Lily, a squirrelly visitor causes construction complications.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: It's the first day of school in Builder Cove... if Rubble & Crew can finish the building in time! / The pups need a construction solution to save Farmer Zoe's crops and to keep Crunchy the beaver from taking all the water!

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: Carlos and Tracker make PawPaw juice with Paw Patrol when they find out Mayor Goodway and Chickaletta are in trouble. // The top of Farmer's Al's silo has been knocked off and he needs help saving his corn crop.

programme.title: Paw Patrol
programme.desc: A mix-up delivery leads to Ms. Marjorie and Danny speeding out of control in Adventure Bay. Now the Pups must rescue them. // Ryder's present ends up in the jungle and Carlos is trapped in a Jungle Gym. It's up to the Pups to save them.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim explores Rumbleton to find somewhere he can have fun alone. // Tim and Kai try to give Parky the best day ever. // When a storm keeps the Rexes at home they must think of a game to pass the time.

programme.desc: Rubble & Crew are on the job to save Builder Cove after a rainstorm threatens to flood the town. // Rubble and Motor come up with crafty construction solutions to fix Farmer Zoe's squirrel problem before the Farm Fair.

programme.title: Rubble & Crew
programme.desc: Rubble & the pups find Grandpa Gravel's lucky bowling ball. Too bad Builder Cove doesn't have a bowling alley... until now!

programme.desc: When Daisy skins her knee learning to skateboard, Mr. Crocodile tries to keep her from ever getting another booboo. // Good sports Mr. Crocodile and Daisy face off in a game of soccer with bad sport Winston.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: Tim tries to find a new rocket that's perfect for him.

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space

programme.title: Tim Rex in Space
programme.desc: It's the Roar Festival, and Tim wants to have the best Roar in town.

programme.title: Barbapapa - One Big Happy Family!
programme.desc: During a bike ride, the Barbapapa family discovers an old medieval castle in ruins. // Barbapapa and Lolita were traveling in a balloon, but caught in a storm they ended up stranded on a deserted island.

programme.title: ER S2 12
programme.desc: Ross accuses an alcoholic father of neglect; Greene's daughter expresses her anger over the divorce; Dr. Morgenstern is admitted as a patient.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 14
programme.desc: Jane and Fischer investigate a murder at an oil fracking site, while Rigsby and Van Pelt reunite with the team and the FBI to uncover who's hunting former CBI members.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 4
programme.desc: Our buyers throw down to score a locker packed with rare movie memorabilia. Then, Papa Bear and T-Money each scoop up low-grade bins, but when they each start to sift through their individual messes, one of them finds a childhood dream-come-true. Andlater, the day's final auction sparks an intense bidding war, but when one of our buyers shoots the moon on his bid, it leaves everyone else wondering exactly where all of this cash is coming from.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 5
programme.desc: Our buyers lock horns to win a unit packed with valuable construction equipment. Then, Brandon and Lori spot something that no one else does, but they'll have to play it cool if they want to walk away with this golden score. And later, the day's final locker smells of gas and cash, but leads to a showdown that gets one of our buyers banned from the auction.

programme.title: ER S1 12
programme.desc: Chloe plans to move to Texas with her boyfriend and have her baby. Carter struggles through his first surgery. Benton's sister insists they place their mother in a nursing home.New Year's Eve Episode

programme.title: World's Dumbest S16 10
programme.desc: The spotlight shines on 20 of the Worlds Dumbest Performers. From an underwear clad girl giving a sobriety test, to amateur firework technicians, plus a funeral home Christmas greeting that will send shivers down your spine - these dumb performers shine in the roles they were born to play. Plus, awesome commentary from our cast of comedians, including Brendon Walsh, Kevin McCaffrey and Jaime Andrews.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 6
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Sal, and Q get in a pickle serving up humiliating tasks as deli waiters, and later they step behind the counter asking customers to settle a series of silly debates. Plus tonight's big loser gets burned during an embarrassing toast that leaves everyone speechless.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 7
programme.desc: In a Mexican restaurant, Michael treats incredulous diners to a good luck serpent with their tableside guacamole, and makes salsa so spicy it melts metal. Then, he confuses office coworkers with a never-ending brown bag lunch and a frozen meal thatturns out to be alarmingly fresh. Plus, he confounds his new assistant with some tricks of the trade as a real estate agent, including freshening dead flowers right before her eyes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 8
programme.desc: Michael mystifies laundromat patrons by impossibly multiplying miniscule amounts of detergent, and makes one man's day when he convinces him that he's hit the coin machine jackpot. Then at a thrift store, Michael taps into his musical abilities by turning into a human record player. Plus, as an employee at a shipping store, he astonishingly flips a full bowl of punch without spilling a drop and repeatedly teleports a glass penguin to one customer's dismay.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 1
programme.desc: Superman is locked in a brutal battle with Luthor’s monster; Lois and the boys race against time to save General Lane.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 15
programme.desc: Jane and Rigsby race to save Van Pelt from the killer who is hunting former CBI members, but it will take all of Jane's skills to locate her before it's too late.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 7
programme.desc: Brandon and Jesse lock horns in a do or die bidding war. One of them spies an authentic treasure hidden amongst the contents, but only one will walk away with the score. And later, a newbie steals a prize unit out from under our regulars and proves that she's here to play. Then, Brandon and Lori unearth a five-alarm find. If it works, they could be looking at a $20,000 pay day on this item alone.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 7
programme.desc: In a Mexican restaurant, Michael treats incredulous diners to a good luck serpent with their tableside guacamole, and makes salsa so spicy it melts metal. Then, he confuses office coworkers with a never-ending brown bag lunch and a frozen meal thatturns out to be alarmingly fresh. Plus, he confounds his new assistant with some tricks of the trade as a real estate agent, including freshening dead flowers right before her eyes.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect S1 8
programme.desc: Michael mystifies laundromat patrons by impossibly multiplying miniscule amounts of detergent, and makes one man's day when he convinces him that he's hit the coin machine jackpot. Then at a thrift store, Michael taps into his musical abilities by turning into a human record player. Plus, as an employee at a shipping store, he astonishingly flips a full bowl of punch without spilling a drop and repeatedly teleports a glass penguin to one customer's dismay.

programme.title: ER S1 13
programme.desc: Benton is called out of surgery to find his senile mother. Kayson formally charges Lewis with negligence in the death of a patient. Carter is forced to help Benton's new intern.

programme.title: The Fresh Prince of Bel-Air S1 10
programme.desc: Will falls for a blind date of Geoffrey's and tries to impress her. But, to Will's surprise, Geoffrey outshines him. Supermodel Naomi Campbell guest stars.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers S5 7
programme.desc: The guys are forced to look for love in all the wrong places at a singles' event, and then phone it in making embarrassing calls on strangers' cells. And there's no happily-ever-after for tonight's big loser when his storybook ending becomes a humiliating sob story.

programme.title: The Mentalist S6 15
programme.desc: Jane and Rigsby race to save Van Pelt from the killer who is hunting former CBI members, but it will take all of Jane's skills to locate her before it's too late.

programme.title: ER S2 11
programme.desc: Shep is on Malik and Benton's bad side after a remark he makes. Al begs for another chance. Mark is served with divorce papers. A patient, Mrs. Rubadoux, shows no signs of recovery.

programme.title: The Big Bang Theory S8 18
programme.desc: When a magazine incorrectly credits Sheldon as the lead scientist of the paper he co-wrote with Sheldon, things get awkward.

programme.title: Friends S7 21
programme.desc: As Monica and Chandler prepare their wedding vows, they and their friends reminisce. The episode features numerous clips from previous episodes.

programme.title: Superman & Lois S4 1
programme.desc: Superman is locked in a brutal battle with Luthor’s monster; Lois and the boys race against time to save General Lane.

programme.title: Storage Hunters S2 6
programme.desc: Minds are blown when two of our buyers team up for a major score. It's an unlikely pair that, together, could make a pile of cash. Plus, Jesse takes a big gamble on some African art and sweats it out hard when the authenticity is questioned. And later, the day's final auction reveals contents so shocking our buyers may be shut out of this game completely.

programme.title: The Losers
programme.desc: An explosive tale of double cross and revenge, "The Losers" centers upon the members of an elite U.S. Special Forces unit sent into the Bolivian jungle on a search and destroy mission. The team--Clay, Jensen, Roque, Pooch and Cougar --find themselves the target of a lethal betrayal instigated from inside by a powerful enemy known only as Max. Presumed dead, the group makes plans to even the score when they're joined by the mysterious Aisha, a beautiful operative with her own agenda. Working together, they must remain deep undercover while tracking the heavily-guarded Max, a ruthless man bent on embroiling the world in a new high-tech global war.

programme.title: The Little Things
programme.desc: Denzel Washington stars in this psychological thriller following two cops, one haunted by echoes of his past, investigating a series of murders.

programme.title: The World - Episode 82
programme.desc: There's never been a more important time to stay in touch with what's happening in our world. Girish Sawlani presents the latest international news from ABC News correspondents as well as interviews with experts and guests.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 105
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: News Breakfast - Episode 105
programme.desc: As each day begins get the facts you need to stay informed. James Glenday and Emma Rebellato present the latest news, overnight developments and today's top stories, joined by Catherine Murphy, Nate Byrne and Lillian Rangiah.

programme.title: ABC News Mornings - Episode 105
programme.desc: Stay in the know with what's happening this morning. ABC News brings you up-to-the-minute news to fuel your daily conversations so you can stay connected and follow the discussion across the day. Presented by Gemma Veness.

programme.title: ABC News at Noon - Episode 105
programme.desc: The leading news at lunchtime. Ros Childs brings you the day's top stories and the latest news as it unfolds, with reporters in the community across Australia and around the world reporting on the issues that matter to you.

programme.title: Landline - Episode 14
programme.desc: A tasty sampler of stories from the land - covering food, agriculture, crops, climate, business and innovation - as we meet the fascinating people who make our rural and regional communities unique. Presented by Pip Courtney.

programme.title: Four Corners - Episode 15
programme.desc: The multi-award winning Four Corners returns for another year of powerhouse investigative journalism - fearless and forensic, exposing scandals, triggering inquiries, leading debate and holding power to account for 65 years.

programme.title: Media Watch - Episode 16
programme.desc: Australia's leading forum for media analysis and comment. Host Linton Besser, a four-time Walkley award-winning investigative reporter and former foreign correspondent, brings you a fearless critique of the week's journalism.

programme.title: Dr Karl's How Things Work - Chips
programme.desc: Dr Karl crunches into the crispy, salty, science packed world of chips, proving there's more to one of the nation's favourite treats than meets the mouth.

programme.title: Restoration Australia - Manly Bower, NSW
programme.desc: Host Anthony Burke meets a couple supersizing a beachside bungalow into a Sydney trophy home while still somehow trying to preserve its quaint 1920's identity.

programme.title: Larapinta - Episode 6

programme.title: The Truth About Fasting - A Catalyst Special - The Truth About Fasting

programme.title: Behave
programme.desc: Following the death of their friend, a group of young adults travels to a villa on the outskirts of London that contains a deep mystery. As unsettling events escalate during their luxurious stay, they must unravel the villa’s dark secrets.

programme.title: Model Family
programme.desc: A single-parent family (Yu Xiang and Tong Tong) moves into a new neighbourhood where everyone’s life seems perfect. However, while things may look rosy on the outside, dark secrets and horror raid each family from the inside, and nothing really are as they seem.

programme.title: Chapter 1 Mae Nak Reborn
programme.desc: Mae Nak the ghost wife returns to take revenge for a pregnant woman who is sexually assaulted and loses her baby. No one can identify the assailant except Mae Nak, who turns into an evil spirit in order to punish the assailant for his evil deeds.

programme.title: Jealousy
programme.desc: Model Min is admitted to a hospital, but mysteriously falls to her death at night. Rumour has it that the hospital is haunted. Subsequently, Min's photographer begins receiving eerie phone calls, the writer loses consciousness in a bizarre car accident, and her friend mysteriously disappears…

programme.title: Fate Jealous Greed
programme.desc: The film consists of three short horror stories: a man tries to survive after he received a haunted mail predicting his death; while a man mourns the death of his beloved wife, she becomes a ghost and tries to communicate with him; three brothers clash over the care options of their elderly mother during dinner, leading to a terrifying murder.

programme.title: Painted Face
programme.desc: Scholar Wang Huai Qing sells paintings to save his ailing wife. He is attacked by a bird demon along the way but is rescued by Fox demon Xiao Rong. To elude the pursuit, Wang brings Xiao Rong home, sparking a love triangle and at the same time, unfolding an impending love between human and demon.

However, her dream transforms into a chilling nightmare on Christmas Eve when Luke's vampire companions track him down...

programme.title: The Getaway
programme.desc: Three KOLs set out to live‑stream their trip to a remote island, but are deceived by a mysterious old woman who traps them there, intent on finding brides for her disabled grandsons. As they are captured, they must race against time to escape.

programme.title: Room For Rent
programme.desc: Lonely widow Joyce rents out a room in her house and becomes dangerously obsessed with a younger guest. Desperate for love, she is willing to eliminate anyone hindering her pursuit of happiness, and a chilling tale of obsession unfolds.

programme.title: Detrimental
programme.desc: You Ji Ren is a blind man who works at a factory in an outlying island. When the factory is cut off from the outside world by a hurricane one day, a monster appears and turns whoever sees it into black shadows. As You cannot see the monster, he is able to help other coworkers leave safely and fight to kill the monster!

programme.title: Grade 6 Math
programme.desc: Understand the nature of solid figures, sequences in forming rules, expressions and equations. Learn more about rate and speed, and of area and surface area of plane and solid or space figures.

programme.title: Grade 6 English
programme.desc: Know how to present reports of differing viewpoints and how to evaluate narratives.

programme.title: Grade 6 Araling Panlipunan
programme.desc: Alamin kung paano unawain at pahalagahan ang pagpupunyagi ng mga Pilipino tungo sa pagtugon sa mga suliranin, isyu at hamon ng kasarinlan.

programme.title: Grade 6 Science
programme.desc: Learn more about gravity, friction and how they affect movement of objects, alongside how energy is transformed in simple machines.

programme.title: Preschool | ECCD
programme.desc: Learn about the concept of size, length, weight, time, and money. Study how children can take care of themselves and understand the objects in the environment and their attributes.

programme.title: Kindergarten

programme.title: Grade 1 Math
programme.desc: Know more about fractions 1⁄2 and 1/4, 2-dimensional and 3-dimensional figures, as well as continuous and repeating patterns and mathematical sentences.

programme.desc: Learn about polite expressions and how to talk about oneself, one’s family and one’s personal experiences.

programme.desc: SpongeBob gets in over his head when he volunteers to babysit Sandy's 3 nieces. // SpongeBob and Patrick volunteer as guards at the museum, while Squidward attempts to hang his painting unnoticed.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Patrick loses the remote in the cushions, so he journeys into the couch to track it down. // Patrick hosts a telethon to raise money for snails who can't dance.

programme.title: The Patrick Star Show
programme.desc: Cave Pat hosts a show with his cave family.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Leni is put in charge of the school's prom, she is determined to make it the most memorable night ever. // Lincoln and Clyde cast Luan as the villain, Bee Trayal, in their David Steele film and have to deal with her method acting.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: To earn her next patch and become a golden Snickerdoodle, Lola must spend quality time with Sunset Canyon senior, Bernie. // After Lynn sees cousin Shiloh's athletic skills, she gets overly competitive to prove she's the greatest Loud of all time.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family's excited to take Jack to Lake World, Lily's favorite theme park. But when a lackluster day ends with realizing Lily's favorite ride has vanished, the kids must survive a thrilling adventure to find it and save their vacation.

programme.title: Wylde Pak
programme.desc: The family gets stuck in a traffic jam that leads to all human civility getting thrown out the passenger side window. // Jack and Lily attempt to catch a legendary town fish despite horror stories from townsfolk who have tried and failed before them.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants
programme.desc: Plankton travels two thousand years into the future and finds a few unfamiliar faces. // SpongeBob, Patrick, and Sandy find themselves in the middle of a long-standing feud between the Narwhals and the Planktons.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Stan claims to have a real Marsupilami appearing in a show he's putting on, but it's a fake robot.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: It's the Chahuta's Chili eating contest, and soon it's revealed Marcel's a cheat.

programme.title: The Marsupilamis
programme.desc: Mica's Marsup journal ends up in Acu's bag so he has to get it back before his friend finds it.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: Lincoln plots to take the 'perfect' family photo for his parents' anniversary gift. // Lincoln and his sisters bet on who can go the longest without doing their most annoying habits.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: The Loud kids and their cousins come up with a plan to convince Lance and Sharon to move their family to Royal Woods. // When Lynn gets the opportunity to be a trainer at her uncle's gym, she struggles to motivate her out of shape clients.

programme.title: The Loud House
programme.desc: When Lisa's science club holds a fundraiser, she struggles to master the art of salesmanship.

programme.title: That Girl Lay Lay
programme.desc: Sadie and Lay Lay are enlisted to help save the school's boxing club, and set up a fight between Sadie and Gigi that is sure to draw a crowd. Now all that's left to do is train Sadie to fight. How hard can it be?

programme.title: The Thundermans: Undercover
programme.desc: Mrs. Wong visits Secret Shores, and threatens to reveal the Thundermans' superhero identities to the town. But Max and Phoebe's plan to have Dr. Colosso keep her quiet backfires in ways they could not have imagined.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Henry's nerves are put the test when Piper invites her new boyfriend and his family over for dinner.

programme.title: Henry Danger
programme.desc: Captain Man reveals a "Crimefighters Only" room in the Man Cave. Jealous, Charlotte, Jasper and Schwoz make a cooler room to show them up. As the gang fights over who gets the better room, things get blown out of proportion.

programme.title: Puto ep 10
programme.desc: A modern sequel from the classic 80's movie of the same title with Herbert Bautista reprising his role as Puto, now with his son Uno.

programme.title: Taddy Taddy Po ep 11
programme.desc: A Sari-Sari Original Series. In this modern family, love wins. Alex is an up-and-coming reporter in a relationship with Marcus, a chef. One day, Alex's sister's kids show up at the couple's doorstep and the couple has no choice but to take care of the kids.

programme.title: Brush ep 14
programme.desc: Alex becomes a famous makeup artist because of her mother’s unique brush set but will face a challenge when all her clients begin to die, one by one.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 22
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: Di na Muli ep 7
programme.desc: Di Na Muli tells the story of a young woman who tries to overcome her life's biggest regret (complicated by her special ability to see how much time remains of someone’s life) but ends up falling in love with the man who caused the death of her one great lov

programme.title: Sari Saring Sine: Kadenang Bulaklak
programme.desc: Jasmin, Baby, Violy and Daisy are siblings who lost their parents Elsa and Domeng in a bus accident after their scheduled out-of-town radio drama performance. Left under the care of young couple Tere and Merto after their parents' death, as they were attempting to start a family of their own. They could only remain guardians for Jasmin, but not her siblings. Jasmin gets separated from her siblings when Father Barrientos sends Baby, Violy and Daisy for adoption.

programme.title: Totoy Bato ep 22
programme.desc: The series is based on the graphic novel created by Carlo J. Caparas. Totoy Bato, a young man, fighting for justice for his lost loved ones; also fighting for equality and fairness against his old friend turned nemesis Dwayne.

programme.title: Team A S2 ep 8
programme.desc: Matapos mapatunayan nila Janet (Kim Molina) at Ian (Jerald Napoles) ang pagmamahalan at diskarte sa kani-kanilang pamilya, ano pa ang mga pagsubok na haharapin ng pamilya Ambida? Ano ang naghihintay sa paglipat nila sa bago nilang komunidad lalo pa at magtatagpo uli si Janet at Enzo (Wilbert Ross), ex boyfriend ni Janet, na tutulong din sa kanilang negosyo? Paano ito haharapin ni Ian sa gitna ng pagkawala ng trabaho?
